name: Lossless Context Management
description: DAG-based context compression that never loses a message. Hierarchical summarization with full recall via grep, describe, and expand tools.

freshTailCount.description: Number of recent messages to always keep raw (not summarized)

contextThreshold.description: Fraction of context window that triggers compaction (0.0-1.0)

summaryModel.description: Model for summarization. 'auto' uses the model router at FAST tier.

leafChunkTokens.description: Target token count per leaf compaction chunk

leafTargetTokens.description: Target token count for each leaf summary output

condensedTargetTokens.description: Target token count for condensed (higher-depth) summaries

incrementalMaxDepth.description: Maximum DAG depth for incremental compaction. -1 = unlimited.

largeFileTokenThreshold.description: Files above this token count are stored externally with exploration summaries

databasePath.description: Path to LCM SQLite database. Defaults to ~/.argentos/lcm.db

enabled.label: Enable LCM
enabled.help: Replace default flat compaction with DAG-based hierarchical compression

freshTailCount.label: Fresh Tail Messages
freshTailCount.help: Recent messages kept verbatim in context. Higher = more raw context, less compression.

contextThreshold.label: Compaction Threshold
contextThreshold.help: Trigger compaction when context fills to this fraction (0.75 = 75%)

summaryModel.label: Summary Model
summaryModel.help: Model used for summarization. 'auto' routes through the model router at FAST tier (Haiku-class).

databasePath.label: Database Path
databasePath.help: Custom path for the LCM SQLite database

largeFileTokenThreshold.label: Large File Threshold
largeFileTokenThreshold.help: Files over this token count are stored externally with summaries injected into context

expansionTimeoutMs.label: Expansion Timeout
expansionTimeoutMs.help: How long lcm_expand_query sub-agent is allowed to run
